name: Fruit Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the prunes and figs in just enough water to cover for 1 hour.
2. Add the dates and cook gently in the same water for 20 minutes.
3. Remove the fruit, chop it and mix with the other fruits and nuts.
4. Reduce the liquid to 3/4 cup.
5. Cool the mixture to lukewarm, then add yeast and stir until well blended.
6. Add 2 cups of sifted flour, beating well.
7. Let the dough rise until light and spongy.
8. Add spices, salt, fruit mixture, and remaining flour to make a stiff dough.
9. Knead the dough until smooth.
10. Let the dough rise until doubled in bulk.
11. Shape into oval loaves.
12. Brush with slightly sweetened milk and sprinkle with chopped almonds.
13. Let rise again.
14. Bake in a 425°F oven for 45 minutes. Makes 3 loaves.
15. If desired, spread with icing and garnish with candied fruits and nut meats when cool.
